acquisition method: peptides were automatically selected for fragmentation by data-dependent analysis
alkylation reagent: 40 µl of iodoacetamide were added to each sample
cleavage agent: the sample digested overnight with 2 µg sequencing grade trypsin
fragmentation method: low-mass accuracy (CID) and high-mass accuracy (HCD) spectra
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Elite (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA)
